items.title: Trading Is Getting Too Risky, Invest Instead; Here Are My 4 Rules
items.description: Current market exuberance and risky trading behavior remind me of the dot-com era. Check out four key rules to navigate volatile markets.

items.title: UnitedHealth Group: Membership Growth Indicates Resilience Amid Rising Medical Cost Pressure
items.description: Discover why UNH's AI-driven cost-cutting and membership growth fuel double-digit revenue projections through 2025, despite economic pressures.

items.title: Wells Fargo Sticks with Overweight on UnitedHealth (UNH), Trims Target to $267
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH) is one of the best defensive stocks to invest in according to analysts. At the time of writing this article, UnitedHealth ranks among the 10 biggest year-to-date decliners, which have lost over 50% among U.S.-listed stocks with a market capitalization exceeding $2 billion.
